title: Romeo & Juliet
lyrics:
​LEX「Romeo & Juliet」の歌詞

[Intro]
I was don't know about love cause
I was living lonely life but
君が教えた Happy & Smile
We don't wanna to be numb
We don't wanna broke up
時を止めてはくれないかい?

[Chorus]
4days Hotel room cocaine all night long
& Sex & Fight oh I don't wanna goodbye
You & me like Romeo & Juliet
Should I let go? (Let go?)

[Verse]
I still believe forever love
ないならSuicide
I still believe forever love
ないならSuicide
Break up coming soon だと通告のよう
いつかはGoodbye そしてHello 俺ら最初に戻る
When u +プラグ 俺 -プラグ
君のテンションもさAttentionだと思ってるんだよ
We still run (Go go)
We still run away from future
We still run (Go go)
We still believeするforever

[Chorus]
4days Hotel room cocaine all night long
& Sex & Fight oh I don't wanna goodbye
You & me like Romeo & Juliet
Should I let go? (Let go?)
